name: Ishqyapa
overview: Cupid is assigned with making Vikram and Puii meet and fall in love with each other. Vikram is from Punjab and Puii is form Mizoram. Vikram and Puii like each other but to be together they have to deal with their differences and fight for their love.

trailers.title: Ishqyapa - Official Trailer | Vinay Pathak, Paramvir Singh | 1st Dec | Amazon miniTV
